THE GENESIS

The Heritage Behind Thrissur's Best Biriyani

Three generations of culinary devotion, from the Andaman shores to the heart of Thrissur.

THE PATHWAY

History in the Making

GEN I

The Andaman Shore Recipe

Our grandfather, a skilled chef from the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, created a secret spice-blend recipe during his time at the historic Bismilla Hotel—the islands' most popular hotel.

GEN II

Home Cooking & Event Rentals

The original recipe passed down to our father, who initially cooked from home for events. To scale up, they rented massive cooking vessels, expanding the home operation into a professional event catering firm and restaurants.

GEN III

Three Restaurants & Catering

Today, we carry the legacy forward. Now a premier catering firm and operating three distinct restaurants, we still follow the exact, time-honored island recipe brought by our grandfather.

OUR STANDARDS

The Four Pillars of Kaiz

local_shipping

Pure Sourcing

Spices are hand-selected directly from organic growers in Kozhikode and Wayanad, ensuring peak freshness.

restaurant

The Art of Dum

We seal our large copper vessels with dough rings. This locks in steam and volatile oil molecules to flavor every grain.
